Microsoft Clarity is a free website analytics and heatmapping tool from Microsoft offering session recordings, click maps, scroll maps, and an AI-powered "Copilot" feature for interpreting user behaviour data. It integrates with Google Analytics 4 and is positioned as a zero-cost alternative to tools like Hotjar and FullStory.

## Registry
